positive: Minimalist, retro-futuristic style illustration of a majestic mountain lion silhouette leaping across a neon-drenched valley at sunset. The scene features stylized desert flora and geometric patterns emanating from the ground, giving a sense of depth and movement. Use a limited color palette of burnt orange, electric teal, deep indigo, and charcoal black. The composition must be highly centered, with the main subject clearly defined against a vibrant gradient sky. Artwork should be vector-like, with clean, solid color blocking and high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Graphic design sensibility, flat vector art, high detail, crisp edges, sharp lines.
